sample_selection: year between 2013 and 2016 inclusive (ACS adult samples after DACA implementation)
hispan == 1 and hispand in {100, 102, 103, 104, 105, 106, 107} to capture Mexican Hispanic origin
birthyr between 1982 and 1996, immigration year between 1900 and 2016, and age between 18 and 40 at interview
usual hours reported between 0 and 97 and person weight (perwt) positive after scaling to define the analytic outcome
